subcommands.name: create
subcommands.description: Create a new project powered by vue-cli-service

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Install a plugin and invoke its generator in an already created project

subcommands.name: invoke
subcommands.description: Invoke the generator of a plugin in an already created project

subcommands.name: serve
subcommands.description: Serve a .js or .vue file in development mode with zero config
